title: Tamable Foxes
description: Turn wild foxes into loyal companions!
body:
# 🦊 Tamable Foxes

**Turn wild foxes into your most loyal friends!**

This plugin allows players to tame foxes using Raw Chicken, just like wolves. Once tamed, these clever animals gain new abilities, smart AI behaviors, and unique interactions.

## ✨ Key Features

* **❤️ Taming:** Use **Raw Chicken** to tame a fox (configurable chance).
* **🛌 Sleep Together:** When you sleep in a bed, your fox will teleport and curl up next to you!
* **⚔️ Combat AI:** Foxes protect their owners from monsters and attack your targets.
    * *Note: They are smart enough not to attack players (No PvP) or protected animals like chickens (Configurable).*
* **🎒 Equipment:** Crouch + Right-Click to give your fox items!
    * Give them a **Sword** for damage.
    * Give them a **Totem of Undying**, and they will use it if they take fatal damage!
    * Give them **Food** to heal.
* **🖥️ GUI Menu:** Type `/foxes` to open a beautiful menu.
    * Rename your fox.
    * Change fox type (Red <-> Snow) instantly.
    * Teleport lost foxes to you.
* **🛡️ Smart Behaviors:**
    * **Sit:** Stay and look around.
    * **Sleep:** Curl up and ignore the world.
    * **Follow:** Run freely with you.

## 📜 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Permission | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/foxes` | `tamablefoxes.command.menu` | Opens the Fox Management GUI. |
| `/givefox <player>` | `tamablefoxes.command.give` | Admin command to give a tamed fox. |
| `/foxreload` | `tamablefoxes.command.reload` | Reloads the `config.yml`. |
| *(Interaction)* | `tamablefoxes.tame` | Allows a player to tame foxes. |
| *(Passive)* | `tamablefoxes.bypass.limit` | Bypasses the max fox limit. |

## ⚙️ Configuration

You can customize almost everything in `config.yml`. The plugin supports **English** and **Russian** languages out of the box!

```yaml
settings:
  # Language (ru / en)
  language: en
  
  # Chance to tame a fox with Raw Chicken (0-100)
  tame-chance: 33
  
  # Maximum amount of foxes per player
  max-foxes: 5
  
  # Should tamed foxes attack chickens/rabbits?
  attack-passive-mobs: false
